data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the persona scenario 'Time-limited accept/decline window', but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this specific scenario is supported or leads to a clear failure report. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the time-limited aspect of the scenario, indicating a gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement. Specifically, there is no mention of how the system handles time-limited decisions, which is critical for validating the expected outcome.
gaps: No evidence of how the system handles time-limited accept/decline decisions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
